title: elymus arenosus
intro: Elymus arenosus, also known as sand wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that grows in dry, sandy soils and is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elymus arenosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of Elymus arenosus typically include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
